title: Suspicion Ecology
objective: Make multiple suspect theories feel alive at once through distinct motives, opportunities, and reactions.
storyQuestions: How many plausible suspect theories can a midgame player currently hold?
What does each major suspect look like when read as innocent versus dangerous?
Where is social pressure generating theory rather than noise?
baseAcceptanceChecks: At least three plausible theories remain legible in the touched span.
Major suspects react to pressure in distinguishable ways.
